name: ZoSwi Platform DevContainer
updateContentCommand: [ -f packages.txt ] && sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y && sudo xargs apt install -y <packages.txt; [ -f requirements.txt ] && pip3 install --user -r requirements.txt; echo 'Platform dependencies installed'

postAttachCommand.server: echo 'Start backend: cd zoswi-ai-interview/backend && uvicorn app.main:app --reload; frontend: cd zoswi-ai-interview/frontend && npm run dev'
